product: Enable access requests across your Unity Catalog metastore (Public Preview) ​
tagline: June 22, 2026 You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level.
what_it_does: June 22, 2026 You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level. This feature also lets you set a metastore level destination that's inherited by all catalogs, schemas, and other objects without their own destination.
why_it_matters: See [Manage access requests](/aws/en/data governance/unity catalog/manage privileges/access request destinations).

capabilities.title: June 22, 2026 You
capabilities.desc: June 22, 2026 You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level.

key_takeaway: June 22, 2026 You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level.
